overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit covered pedestrian arcade in Night City. The player passes vending machines, holographic advertisements including a prominent 'Watson Whore' billboard, and transitions through a sterile white corridor before emerging into an open plaza with purple neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with vending machines and yellow seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade, passing seated pedestrians and vending machines on the right

notable_agents.action: sitting on a white stool near the vending machines

entered.detail: row of illuminated arcade and snack vending machines with glowing screens
bright yellow seating blocks against red paneled walls
large illuminated advertisement for Mix It Up beverage with purple and white graphics
digital advertising screens mounted on the ceiling displaying various products

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian arcade with wet reflective pavement. The player walks past yellow benches and vending machines on the right, while large digital billboards including a 'Mix It Up' advertisement line the left wall. The corridor is moderately crowded with pedestrians walking in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered corridor with large pink neon billboard

events.description: approaching street musician playing electric guitar near the Watson Whore billboard

agents.ego_description: walking toward a musician busking near a large pink neon billboard, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: playing electric guitar next to an open case and cardboard sign on the ground

entered.detail: large pink neon billboard with graffiti reading 'Watson Whore' advertising a TV show
wall covered in spray paint and tags surrounding the billboard
scattered cardboard and litter on the wet pavement near the musician

segments.scene_description: The player continues through the corridor approaching a large pink neon 'Watson Whore' billboard covered in graffiti. A street musician plays guitar near the wall amidst scattered trash. The Mix It Up billboard recedes into the distance on the left as the player moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: sterile white tiled transit corridor with intense lighting

events.description: entering brightly lit white corridor with reflective floors and cyan neon door frames
exiting bright corridor back into darker neon-lit plaza area

agents.ego_description: passing through a stark white transit corridor with glowing advertisements on the walls

entered.detail: sterile corridor with white ceramic tiles covering walls and floors with bright overhead lighting
intensely illuminated advertisement screens showing Mix It Up and other products
doorway frame glowing with cyan neon light marking the corridor entrance and exit

segments.scene_description: The player enters a stark white tiled corridor that serves as a transition space between areas. The lighting shifts dramatically to bright white, with glowing cyan neon door frames and reflective floors. Advertisements including Mix It Up appear on the walls before the player exits back into the darker neon environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with coffee advertisement and neon storefronts

events.description: exiting white corridor into main plaza with Matapang Coffee billboard visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the commercial plaza passing various neon signs and approaching an open area

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the player toward the plaza exit

entered.detail: large billboard with yellow text reading 'Tough Morning?' advertising Matapang Coffee
illuminated storefront sign for Softsys with cyan neon lettering
continuous orange neon light strips running along the ceiling edges

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bright corridor, the player enters a spacious commercial plaza featuring a prominent 'Tough Morning?' coffee advertisement. Orange neon strips illuminate the ceiling while various storefronts including Softsys line the walkway. The area is less crowded as the player approaches an opening leading to an outdoor plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central fountain and purple neon lighting under night sky

events.description: emerging from covered walkway into open plaza with visible night sky and purple neon lights

agents.ego_description: approaching the central fountain structure in the open plaza with night sky visible overhead

entered.detail: large tiered fountain structure with plants in the center of the open plaza
horizontal purple neon light beams spanning across the plaza entrance
dark night sky visible above the buildings after exiting the covered walkway
black and yellow striped bollards lining the pedestrian path

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered walkway into a wide open plaza under the night sky. Purple neon beams span the entrance while a central fountain dominates the plaza ahead. The environment shifts from enclosed to open, with bollards marking the pedestrian path and the dark sky visible above the surrounding buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit pedestrian arcade that transitions from a crowded corridor into a wide, open-air plaza. It begins on wet, reflective pavement, moving past yellow benches and digital billboards while weaving through a stream of pedestrians. As the camera advances, the environment shifts toward a graffiti-covered pink neon billboard and a street musician before suddenly entering a stark, bright white tiled corridor defined by glowing cyan door frames. The scene then opens back into a darker commercial space illuminated by orange neon strips and coffee advertisements, passing various storefronts as the walkway expands. Finally, the camera emerges from the enclosure into a vast nighttime plaza, where the architecture gives way to a dark sky and purple neon beams framing a central fountain.
